description: Control plane certificate expiration and TLS health metrics via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Single static instance. min_cert_expiry_seconds is P1 of the apiserver client cert TTL histogram. kubelet_cert_ttl_seconds is the minimum across all nodes. Thresholds at 7 days and 24 hours respectively.
name: OCP_Certificate_Health
